raw_consumer_statement:
I tried to dispute a charge with Citi Card ; it would not do so. I called Citi Card today ; its off-shored phone service would not start the dispute. 

The disputed charge is dated XX/XX/year> for {$270.00} to is XXXX - its phone number is XXXX XXXX XXXX. 

I am also very concerned that Citi Card would not start the dispute ; its workers kept asking me for more information about myself and it was hard to understand the workers since their mother tongue is not XXXX. Since I do not have a smart phone they could not send me codes and requests for more information. 

I fear I am getting ripped off by Citi Card and XXXX. 

Please help.
